sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110209" key="fallhfore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φαλληφορ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n110209.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carry a phallus in procession,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.365c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
